result.stdout:
org - Org file querying and roam database management

Usage: org [options] <command> [arguments]

Global Options:
  -d, --directory <path>  Base directory (default: current directory)
  --files <file>          Explicit file list (can be repeated)
  -f, --format <format>   Output format: text or json (default: text)
  --config <path>         Config file path (default: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/org-cli/config.json)
  --log-done <action>     Override log-done: none, time, or note
  --deadline-warning-days <n>  Override deadline warning days
  --dry-run               Preview mutation without writing to file
  -q, --quiet             Suppress informational text output
  -v, --verbose           Print diagnostic info (DB paths, directory, files) to stderr
  --db <path>             Database path (default: <dir>/.org.db for roam, <dir>/.org-index.db for index)

Org Commands:
  headlines [-d dir] [--todo STATE] [--tag TAG] [--level N] [--property K=V]
                                         List headlines with optional filters
  todo list [-d dir] [--state STATE] [--tag TAG] [--priority P] [--sort FIELD]
                                         List and filter TODO items
  todo set [<file>] <headline> <state>   Set TODO state (use "" to clear)
  add <file> <title> [options]           Add a new headline
    --todo STATE  --priority P  --tag TAG  --scheduled DATE  --deadline DATE
    --under <title-or-pos>               Insert as child of headline
  priority <file> <title-or-pos> <A-Z|"">
                                         Set or clear priority
  tag add <file> <title-or-pos> <tag>    Add tag to headline
  tag remove <file> <title-or-pos> <tag> Remove tag from headline
  property set <file> <title-or-pos> <key> <value>
                                         Set a property
  property remove <file> <title-or-pos> <key>
                                         Remove a property
  schedule <file> <title-or-pos> <date>  Set SCHEDULED (use "" to clear)
  deadline <file> <title-or-pos> <date>  Set DEADLINE (use "" to clear)
  clock in <file> <title-or-pos>         Start clock
  clock out <file> <title-or-pos>        Stop clock
  clock [report] [-d dir]                Show clock report
  note <file> <title-or-pos> <text>      Add note to logbook
  append <file> <title-or-pos> <text>    Append text to headline body
    --stdin                              Read text from stdin instead
  refile <src-file> <src-title-or-pos> <tgt-file> [<tgt-title-or-pos>]
                                         Refile subtree
  read <file> <title-or-pos>             Read subtree content
  search <pattern> [-d dir]              Search org files for pattern
  archive <file> <title-or-pos>          Archive subtree to .org_archive
  links <file> [-d dir]                  List links with resolution
  export <file> --to <format>            Export via pandoc

Index Commands:
  index [-d dir] [--force]                Build or update the headline index
  fts <query> [-d dir]                    Full-text search via index
  id stamp [-d dir] [--dry-run]            Stamp CUSTOM_ID onto all headlines

Agenda Commands:
  today                                 All TODOs due today or overdue
  agenda [today]                        Scheduled + deadlines + overdue for today
  agenda week                           Next 7 days
  agenda todo [--state STATE]            All TODO items, optionally filtered
  agenda --tag TAG                       Filter any view by tag

Roam Commands:
  roam sync [--force]                    Sync database with files
  roam node list                         List all nodes
  roam node get <node-id>                Get a node by ID
  roam node find <title-or-alias>        Find a node by title or alias
  roam node create <title> [options]     Create a new node
    -t, --tags <tag>                     Add tag (can be repeated)
    -a, --aliases <alias>                Add alias (can be repeated)
    -r, --refs <ref>                     Add ref (can be repeated)
    --parent <file>                      Parent file for headline node
  roam node read <node-id>               Read node file content
  roam backlinks <node-id>               Get backlinks to a node
  roam tag list                          List all tags
  roam tag find <tag>                    Find nodes by tag
  roam link add <src-file> <src-id> <tgt-id> [--description <desc>]
                                         Add a link between nodes
  roam alias add <file> <node-id> <alias>
                                         Add an alias
  roam alias remove <file> <node-id> <alias>
                                         Remove an alias
  roam ref add <file> <node-id> <ref>    Add a reference
  roam ref remove <file> <node-id> <ref> Remove a reference
